name: @metorial/echtpost
description: Send real physical postcards programmatically through the German EchtPost platform. Create and schedule postcard deliveries using pre-designed templates, manage recipient contacts and groups, and list available postcard templates. Supports scheduling delivery dates, configuring email notifications for send events, specifying recipients inline or by contact/group ID, and sending bulk postcards to recipient groups. Requires a prepaid account balance for sending.
